headline: 2 Reasons to Like ADI (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: What a time it’s been for Analog Devices. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has increased by a massive 74.7%, reaching $421.90 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
